platform: macOS (Apple Silicon) for the local database; cross-platform for the companion containers

database.note: The DB runs on the host via the Personal launcher; it is NOT a container in this stack. The companion containers connect to it via host.docker.internal.

jsonTables.pinBeforeRelease: Replace main with a tested tag or commit.

ports.db: discovered at install time via `exasol info --json` (dynamic)
